headline: CF Industries Holdings shares are trading lower after the company announced it settled litigation with Orica and Nelson Brothers. Also, it ended its ammonium nitrate supply agreements.

headline: CF Industries Settles Litigation With Orica And Nelson Brothers For $169.5M; Ends Ammonium Nitrate Supply Agreements
summary: On March 15, 2026, CF Industries Sales, LLC and CF Industries Nitrogen LLC, both subsidiaries of CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (collectively, the "Company") signed an agreement to settle litigation with Orica
